label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 21

extraction.one_line_summary: MOLANO Juan Sebastian won Stage 21 in Madrid after being forced to continue his leadout when PEDERSEN Mads chased, accidentally taking victory ahead of the sprint.
tactical_patterns: JOHANSSON Julius and PLAPP Luke's late breakaway forced sprinter teams to chase deep into final lap, disrupting leadout organization.
UAE Emirates tried distance sprint setup with OLIVEIRA Ivo to MOLANO to ACKERMANN but leadout man kept going under PEDERSEN pressure.
Stage 21 intermediate sprint saw RODRIGUEZ Carlos attempt bonus seconds attack on AYUSO Juan to defend podium position but failed.

rider_signals.MOLANO Juan Sebastian: positive: forced to abandon leadout role and continue sprinting when PEDERSEN chased, showing hidden finishing speed for domestique
rider_signals.PLAPP Luke: positive: animated late breakaway attempt with technical corners remaining suggests confidence in criterium-style handling
rider_signals.RODRIGUEZ Carlos: negative: attempted intermediate sprint bonus seconds to gain podium over AYUSO but couldn't execute tactical plan
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: neutral: won points classification by enormous margin but second place shows he peaked earlier in race
